## Problem and scope

Describe the observable problem and the behavior this change adds or corrects.

## Design

Explain state transitions, ownership, interfaces, errors, and intentional non-goals.

## Verification

List the exact commands, fixtures, seeds, sanitizer runs, or benchmarks used.

## Compatibility and performance

State any C++ API, Python API, protocol, persistence, fixture, or measured-performance impact.

## Documentation and risks

Link updated documentation and identify known limitations or follow-up work.
